description_long: This is a compact, two-story convenience store with a modern, boxy facade and a prominent blue storefront sign reading 'voxel' in stylized block letters. The front features large vertical glass panels above a blue awning, with a checkered tile entryway and a small display window. The side and rear walls are plain, off-white, and punctuated by small rectangular windows and visible utility conduits. The roof is gabled and covered with gray tiles, while the right side displays vertical signage with additional branding. The building sits on a concrete pad, and the overall design is clean and functional, typical of urban commercial architecture. The structure appears to be constructed primarily from concrete, glass, and metal, with some decorative tilework at the entrance.
description: A modern, two-story convenience store with a blue glass facade, large signage, and tiled entryway, set on a concrete pad.
description_view_0: The front view shows the blue glass facade, large 'voxel' sign, blue awning, tiled entry, and partial interior display.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals plain off-white walls, three small windows, visible utility conduits, and the edge of the vertical sign.
description_view_2: The rear view displays a simple, unadorned off-white wall with a gabled roof and no windows or signage.
description_view_3: The right side view features three small windows, utility conduits, and a clear view of the vertical signage with colored icons.
attribute_storefront_signage: Large, blocky 'voxel' sign in white and pink with a blue background, mounted above the awning; additional vertical signage with colored icons on the right side; signage is bold, stylized, and likely illuminated.
attribute_glass_entrance_doors: None; entrance appears to be open or has a non-glass door under the awning.
attribute_display_windows: Tall vertical glass panels on the upper front facade, with a small display window at street level; glass is clear and framed in metal.
